data.description:
INFUSIONS

Also: Arcane Ammunition, Blade Coatings, Combat Runes.

When you hit one or more targets with an attack, you may spend @LOSS[2 ip] to produce a special infusion and apply the corresponding effect to that attack (if the attack had the multi property, apply the effects of the infusion to each target).

You cannot apply more than one infusion to the same attack; producing and using an infusion are both part of the action you used to attack with the weapon.

BASIC INFUSIONS

INFUSIONS

EFFECT

Cryo

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes ice @ICON[ice].

Pyro

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes fire @ICON[fire].

Volt

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes bolt @ICON[bolt].

ADVANCED INFUSIONS

INFUSIONS

EFFECT

Cyclone

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes air @ICON[air].

Exorcism

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes light @ICON[light].

Seismic

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes earth @ICON[earth].

Shadow

The attack deals 5 extra damage, and its damage becomes dark @ICON[dark].

SUPERIOR INFUSIONS

INFUSIONS

EFFECT

Vampire

Choose one option: you recover an amount of HP equal to half the HP loss suffered by the target of the attack; or you recover an amount of MP equal to half the HP loss suffered by the target of the attack.

This infusion can only be used if the attack targeted a single creature.

Venom

The attack deals 5 extra damage, its damage becomes poison @ICON[poison], and each creature hit by the attack suffers poisoned.

This infusion can only be used if the attack targeted a single creature.
